summary: Lead accepts M4 deterministic daily march execution, supply state, and reinforcement timing after systems_architect R3 ACCEPT and lead integration gates. The task adds shared protocol command/query support, authoritative sim-core march state, daily supply/reinforcement updates, canonical hash coverage for m4.marches, and focused scenario/invariant regressions without adding siege, battle resolution, postwar governance, campaign AI policy, client UI, save-format, or naval/diplomacy scope.

tests_run.result: Passed architecture boundaries, determinism, root Vitest 30 files / 202 tests, and web tests 1 file / 3 tests.
Passed format, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary checks.

decisions: Accepted only after R3 resolved route ordering, partial reinforcement quantity, canonical march hashing, and structured validation blockers.
Kept rainy-season pause as a plan-time accepted-route season-risk behavior for this task.
Kept save-format unchanged because M4 march persistence is outside this task and remains an explicit follow-up risk.
risks: M4 march state is live authoritative WorldState but save-format support remains out of scope until a later explicit M4 save/runtime task.
Daily route reforecasting for season changes remains out of scope; current behavior uses accepted-route season risk.
requested_action: Create PR, require CI, merge to main, close task only after integration, then continue to next READY M4 task.
